title: Bridge Essay: Network architectures supporting learnability.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Network, architectures, supporting, learnability..

**Network architectures supporting learnability.** — Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci. PMID: 32089113. DOI: 10.1098/rstb.2019.0323. Human learners acquire complex interconnected networks of relational knowledge. The capacity for such learning naturally depends on two factors: the architecture (or informational structure) of the knowledge network itself and the architecture of the computational unit-the brain-that encodes and processes the information. That is, learning is reliant on integrated network architectures at two levels: the epistemic and the computational, or the conceptual and the neural. Motivated by awish to un
